script_text: Fact books give us two kinds of clues.
The pictures show us how it looks.
Listen. The text says ladybugs are small insects.
The picture shows a ladybug on a green leaf.
The picture shows us the colors, size, and shape. The words told us what kind of bug.
Some things are hard to tell in words.
The exact color of an animal.
The shape of its spots. How tall it is.
Pictures show us those right away!
Read the words and look at the pictures. Together, they give you the whole story.
Now you are ready to use both pictures and words!
